title: Chicken Caesar Salad
instructions: Grill or pan-fry chicken breast until cooked through. Let it rest and then slice it.
Chop romaine lettuce and place in a large bowl.
Add chicken, croutons, and Parmesan cheese to the lettuce.
Drizzle with Caesar dressing and toss to combine.
Serve immediately.

title: Quesadillas
ingredients: 1 cup shredded cheese (cheddar, Monterey Jack, etc.)
Optional fillings: cooked chicken, beans, sautéed vegetables
instructions: Heat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Place one tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle with cheese and any other fillings.
Top with the second tortilla and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are golden brown.
Cut into wedges and serve.

title: Tomato Soup
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in crushed tomatoes and vegetable broth. Bring to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth. Stir in heavy cream and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Butter one side of each slice of bread.
Place one slice of bread, butter-side down, in a skillet over medium heat.
Top with cheese and the other slice of bread, butter-side up.
Grill for 2-3 minutes per side, until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.

title: Tuna Salad Sandwich
instructions: In a small bowl, combine tuna, mayonnaise, celery, and red onion. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve on bread as a sandwich.

title: BLT Sandwich
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet over medium-high heat until crisp. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
Spread mayonnaise on both slices of toast.
Layer lettuce, tomato, and bacon on one slice of toast. Top with the other slice of toast.
